use_cases: Displaying blog post previews with author, date, and read time information
Creating visually appealing article listings in content management systems
Showcasing portfolio or project highlights with image and tags
Building news or media website article cards with modern glass effects
Designing content recommendation sections with hover animations
ai_summary: A glassmorphism blog card component featuring a frosted glass effect with backdrop blur, gradient overlays, and sophisticated hover animations. The card displays blog post content including title, excerpt, featured image with zoom effect, author avatar and name, publication date, read time, and category tags. Built with Framer Motion for entrance animations and enhanced with hover-triggered border glow and shadow effects for an immersive, modern UI experience.
